skills.name: commit
skills.desc: Version-control checkpoint for workspace projects. This is the only git interface available to the CPE — direct git access is prohibited. Stages and commits the specified path within workspace_focus; optionally pushes to origin.

skills.name: file_reader
skills.desc: Read a file within workspace/. Rejects any path outside workspace/.

skills.name: file_writer
skills.desc: Write a file within workspace/. Rejects any path outside workspace/.

skills.name: shell_run
skills.desc: Execute a shell command within workspace_focus. Permitted commands updated to include Python runtime.

skills.name: skill_audit
skills.desc: Validate a skill manifest, executable, and index consistency.

skills.name: skill_create
skills.desc: Stage a new skill cartridge under workspace/stage/<name>/ for Endure installation. Optional --base <name> clones an existing skill as a starting point.

skills.name: web_fetch
skills.desc: Fetch the content of a URL and return it as text. Permitted URL prefixes declared as allowlist in this manifest.

skills.name: worker_skill
skills.desc: Instantiate a text-only sub-agent for tasks that would pollute the main context window: summarizing large documents, cross-referencing multiple files, isolated analysis or classification tasks. Do NOT use for file I/O, sequential workspace operations, or anything you can do directly with file_reader/file_writer/shell_run. The worker has no access to tools or the filesystem — it can only reason and return text.
